message:
feat(store): add bgrewriteaof request flag, harden parse_i64, fix zadd/zincrby key-leak bugs

- Add bgrewriteaof_requested flag to Store with request/take helpers so
  BGREWRITEAOF can be handled via the delegated dispatch path
- Replace parse_i64 with a bounds-checked, no-alloc parser matching Redis
  string2ll semantics (rejects whitespace, leading zeros, overflow)
- Add regression tests: zadd with empty members must not create the key,
  zincrby with NaN must return IncrFloatNaN and not create the key

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
